query: I just cloned this Forge repo and I'm not sure how any of it works — give me the lay of the land: what's the workflow, what skills exist, and where do I even start?
There are a bunch of forge skills and I can't tell which one to use for what — lay out how they fit together and when I'd reach for each.
Which forge CLI command adds a dependency between two issues, and what's the verb for proving I hold a claim? Just the reference, don't run anything.
Is this small cleanup worth filing as a Forge issue, or should I just throw it on a TodoWrite checklist for this session?
Walk me through the Forge stage ladder from planning to post-merge verify and what each stage owns.
Give me the reference of all the day-to-day forge issue and board verbs — I want the index, not to execute a command yet.
What should I pick up next? Rank the ready queue and tell me the top unblocked issue and why.
Where am I in the workflow right now, what's my active work, and has anything gone stale?
Create a bug issue titled 'login times out after 30s', priority 1, and link it under the auth epic.
Claim forge-4h9 for me and confirm I actually hold the lease before I start editing.
Take forge-7c2 all the way from planning through a merged PR, pausing for my approval at the plan and the merge.
In the Hermes harness, give me the token-bounded project state to work from — treat forge orient as the source of truth.
